docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78453978) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHUCHAREON, JANYAPORN AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARD, FRED AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-22-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-20-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-29-2026

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RIGHT OF ENTRYIS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT ON FILE AND DEFENDANT HAS NOT APPEARED IN THE ACTION. CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT REQUIRES THAT AN OSC MUST BE USED "IF THE PARTY AGAINST WHOM THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS SOUGHT HAS NOT APPEARED IN THE ACTION. IF THE RESPONDING PARTY HAS NOT APPEARED, THE OSC MUST BE SERVED IN THE SAME MANNER AS A SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT." (CRC 3.1150(A).) AN OSC HAS NOT BEEN ISSUED IN THIS CASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
